## RECOMMENDATION FOR PLAN 04-03

A4 verdict is MISMATCH_NIC_CARD_MOUNT — Plan 04-03's `load_trial` MUST
either:
  (a) Add a `set_port_link_paths(paths: list[str])` setter on
      `AicScoringPublishers` (D-13 fallback path) AND have
      `load_trial` compute port paths from spawn-atom call sites
      (e.g. `/World/TaskBoard/SCPort_<index>` for sc_port and
      `/World/TaskBoard/NICCardMount_<index>` for nic_card_mount),
      passing them to `_start_aic_scoring_publishers()`.
  (b) Rename the spawn atoms' prim paths to match the hardcoded
      list (lossy — breaks parity with spawn_task_board.launch.py
      naming convention). NOT recommended.

Recommended: option (a). The setter is a 1-surface addition (no
MCP atom needed — it's a public method on the publisher class
called from `_start_aic_scoring_publishers()`).

Live spawn paths to feed into the setter (extracted from this run):
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_006
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_006/Cube_007
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_008
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_008/Cube_008
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_010
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_010/Cube_009
  - /World/TaskBoard/NICCard/nic_card_visual/Cube_012

=== A4 VERDICT: MISMATCH_NIC_CARD_MOUNT ===
